entity.summary: Hyperliquid-native token launch-and-trade venue routing on-chain buys and sells through a Zap contract, with explicit creator and protocol fee distribution.
entity.notes: The first-party site presents a Hyperliquid-backed token launch and trading product. Current contract-level Buy and Sell events and tracked volume support active exchange functionality, but the product is also categorized as a launchpad, so confidence remains medium and the exchange claim is limited to its trading surface.

evidence.title: Alt Fun official website
evidence.notes: Current first-party product surface identifies a Hyperliquid-backed token launch and trading venue.

evidence.title: Alt Fun on-chain trading-volume methodology
evidence.notes: Current independently maintained adapter tracks Buy and Sell events through the production Zap contract and records volume and fee allocation.
